LanguageData.XF_PXBLOOD.label: Phoenix Blood
LanguageData.XF_PXBLOOD.description: In the distant future, the Sanguophage have adopted a simple and violent method to deal with the huge number of Mechs, using their own genome as a base to create a special kind of soldiers against the Mechs. In order to control these soldiers, while injecting the Xenogerm, the nanomachines will eliminate the consciousness of the colonized and take over their bodies, turning them into a group of puppets that only follow the instructions of the Sanguophage. In the midst of a battle, one of these puppets appears out of control. The Sanguophage capture this body and intend to transport it back to the base for research, but an accident occurs during the space jump when the transport ship is activated, and the ship is torn to pieces by gravity and the wreckage falls into the planet. Soon after a human expedition found her in the wreckage of the ship, which started a series of disturbances, and eventually caused a giant colony to split up because of her death, and those who left kept her body samples and launched a research.
LanguageData.XF_PXBLOOD.descriptionShort: The Phoenix blood are the warriors created by the Sanguophage to deal with the Mechs, they react faster than the Sanguophage, and not afraid of fire, but also lacked many of the advantages of the Sanguophage, and they only focus on combat-related skills, their own excessive physical exertion also makes them need a longer rest time.
